option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools">
<uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.ACCESS_NETWORK_STATE" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.POST_NOTIFICATIONS" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE" android:maxSdkVersion="32" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_MEDIA_IMAGES" />
<application android:allowBackup="true" android:dataExtractionRules="@xml/data_extraction_rules" android:fullBackupContent="@xml/backup_rules" android:icon="@drawable/logo2" android:label="@string/app_name" android:roundIcon="@drawable/logo2" android:supportsRtl="true" android:theme="@style/Theme.SanzinKstore">
<activity android:name=".LoginActivity" android:exported="true"> <intent-filter> <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" /> <category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" /> </intent-filter> </activity>
<activity android:name=".MainActivity" android:exported="true" android:launchMode="singleTask"> <intent-filter> <action android:name="android.intent.action.VIEW" /> <category android:name="android.intent.category.DEFAULT" /> <category android:name="android.intent.category.BROWSABLE" /> <data android:scheme="sanzinkstore" android:host="payment_return" /> </intent-filter> </activity>
<activity android:name=".AdminProductActivity" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".InventoryActivity" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".LogsActivity" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".ProfileActivity" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".SettingsActivity" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".ChatActivity" android:exported="false" android:windowSoftInputMode="adjustResize" />
<activity android:name=".SellerInboxActivity" android:exported="false" />
<service android:name=".service.MyFirebaseMessagingService" android:exported="false"> <intent-filter> <action android:name="com.google.firebase.MESSAGING_EVENT" /> </intent-filter> </service>
</application>
</manifest>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools">
<uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.ACCESS_NETWORK_STATE" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.POST_NOTIFICATIONS" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE" android:maxSdkVersion="32" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_MEDIA_IMAGES" />
<application android:allowBackup="true" android:dataExtractionRules="@xml/data_extraction_rules" android:fullBackupContent="@xml/backup_rules" android:icon="@drawable/logo2" android:label="@string/app_name" android:roundIcon="@drawable/logo2" android:supportsRtl="true" android:theme="@style/Theme.SanzinKstore">
<activity android:name=".LoginActivity" android:exported="true"> <intent-filter> <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" /> <category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" /> </intent-filter> <!-- Intercept Firebase password-reset redirect after user clicks the email link --> <intent-filter> <action android:name="android.intent.action.VIEW" /> <category android:name="android.intent.category.DEFAULT" /> <category android:name="android.intent.category.BROWSABLE" /> <data android:scheme="sanzinkstore" android:host="reset_password" /> </intent-filter> </activity>
<activity android:name=".MainActivity" android:exported="true" android:launchMode="singleTask"> <intent-filter> <action android:name="android.intent.action.VIEW" /> <category android:name="android.intent.category.DEFAULT" /> <category android:name="android.intent.category.BROWSABLE" /> <data android:scheme="sanzinkstore" android:host="payment_return" /> </intent-filter> </activity>
<activity android:name=".AdminProductActivity" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".InventoryActivity" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".LogsActivity" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".ProfileActivity" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".SettingsActivity" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".ChatActivity" android:exported="false" android:windowSoftInputMode="adjustResize" />
<activity android:name=".SellerInboxActivity" android:exported="false" />
<service android:name=".service.MyFirebaseMessagingService" android:exported="false"> <intent-filter> <action android:name="com.google.firebase.MESSAGING_EVENT" /> </intent-filter> </service>
</application>
</manifest>

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.drawerlayout.widget.DrawerLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:id="@+id/drawerLayout" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="?android:attr/windowBackground" tools:context=".MainActivity">
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<com.google.android.material.appbar.AppBarLayout android:id="@+id/appBarLayout" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="?attr/colorSurface" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent">
<com.google.android.material.appbar.MaterialToolbar android:id="@+id/toolbar" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="?attr/actionBarSize" app:navigationIconTint="?attr/colorOnSurface" app:title="SanZin K-Store" app:titleCentered="true" app:titleTextColor="?attr/colorOnSurface" />
</com.google.android.material.appbar.AppBarLayout>
<androidx.viewpager2.widget.ViewPager2 android:id="@+id/viewPager" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/bottomPanel" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/appBarLayout" />
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/bottomPanel" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:cardBackgroundColor="?attr/colorSurface" app:cardCornerRadius="0dp" app:cardElevation="8dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent">
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:padding="12dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/lastAddedLabel" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Added Item:" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurface" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/lastAddedValue" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="None" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurface" android:textSize="20sp" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/lastAddedLabel" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/itemsCountLabel" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:text="No. of Items:" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurface" android:textSize="18sp" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/lastAddedValue" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/itemsCountValue" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginEnd="32dp" android:text="0" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurface" android:textSize="18sp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="@id/itemsCountLabel" app:layout_constraintEnd_toStartOf="@id/barrier" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="@id/itemsCountLabel" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/totalLabel" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:text="Total:" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurface" android:textSize="22sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/itemsCountLabel" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/totalValue" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginEnd="32dp" android:text="0" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurface" android:textSize="22sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="@id/totalLabel" app:layout_constraintEnd_toStartOf="@id/barrier" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="@id/totalLabel" />
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.Barrier android:id="@+id/barrier" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:barrierDirection="start" app:constraint_referenced_ids="btnAccept,btnEditCart,btnCancel" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnAccept" android:layout_width="140dp" android:layout_height="60dp" android:backgroundTint="#2ECC71" android:text="Accept" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="18sp" app:cornerRadius="4dp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnEditCart" android:layout_width="140dp" android:layout_height="60dp" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:backgroundTint="#F1C40F" android:text="Edit Cart" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="18sp" app:cornerRadius="4dp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/btnAccept" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnCancel" android:layout_width="140dp" android:layout_height="60dp" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:backgroundTint="#E74C3C" android:text="Cancel" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="18sp" app:cornerRadius="4dp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/btnEditCart" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- Customer Floating Action Button for Cart --> <com.google.android.material.floatingactionbutton.ExtendedFloatingActionButton android:id="@+id/fabCart" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_margin="16dp" android:text="Cart (0) - PHP 0.00" android:visibility="gone" app:icon="@drawable/ic_shopping_cart" app:backgroundTint="?attr/colorPrimary" app:iconTint="?attr/colorOnPrimary" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnPrimary" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/bottomNavigation" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" />
<com.google.android.material.bottomnavigation.BottomNavigationView android:id="@+id/bottomNavigation" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="?attr/colorSurface" android:visibility="gone" app:itemIconTint="?attr/colorPrimary" app:itemTextColor="?attr/colorOnSurface" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:menu="@menu/customer_bottom_nav" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
<com.google.android.material.navigation.NavigationView android:id="@+id/navigationView" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_gravity="start" android:background="?attr/colorSurface" app:headerLayout="@layout/nav_header" app:itemTextColor="?attr/colorOnSurface" app:itemIconTint="?attr/colorOnSurface" app:menu="@menu/drawer_menu" />
</androidx.drawerlayout.widget.DrawerLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.drawerlayout.widget.DrawerLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:id="@+id/drawerLayout" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="?android:attr/windowBackground" tools:context=".MainActivity">
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<com.google.android.material.appbar.AppBarLayout android:id="@+id/appBarLayout" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="?attr/colorSurface" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent">
<com.google.android.material.appbar.MaterialToolbar android:id="@+id/toolbar" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="?attr/actionBarSize" app:navigationIconTint="?attr/colorOnSurface" app:title="SanZin K-Store" app:titleCentered="true" app:subtitleCentered="true" app:titleTextColor="?attr/colorOnSurface" />
</com.google.android.material.appbar.AppBarLayout>
<androidx.viewpager2.widget.ViewPager2 android:id="@+id/viewPager" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/bottomPanel" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/appBarLayout" />
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/bottomPanel" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:cardBackgroundColor="?attr/colorSurface" app:cardCornerRadius="0dp" app:cardElevation="8dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent">
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:padding="12dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/lastAddedLabel" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Added Item:" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurface" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/lastAddedValue" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="None" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurface" android:textSize="20sp" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/lastAddedLabel" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/itemsCountLabel" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:text="No. of Items:" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurface" android:textSize="18sp" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/lastAddedValue" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/itemsCountValue" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginEnd="32dp" android:text="0" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurface" android:textSize="18sp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="@id/itemsCountLabel" app:layout_constraintEnd_toStartOf="@id/barrier" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="@id/itemsCountLabel" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/totalLabel" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:text="Total:" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurface" android:textSize="22sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/itemsCountLabel" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/totalValue" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginEnd="32dp" android:text="0" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurface" android:textSize="22sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="@id/totalLabel" app:layout_constraintEnd_toStartOf="@id/barrier" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="@id/totalLabel" />
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.Barrier android:id="@+id/barrier" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:barrierDirection="start" app:constraint_referenced_ids="btnAccept,btnEditCart,btnCancel" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnAccept" android:layout_width="140dp" android:layout_height="60dp" android:backgroundTint="#2ECC71" android:text="Accept" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="18sp" app:cornerRadius="4dp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnEditCart" android:layout_width="140dp" android:layout_height="60dp" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:backgroundTint="#F1C40F" android:text="Edit Cart" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="18sp" app:cornerRadius="4dp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/btnAccept" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnCancel" android:layout_width="140dp" android:layout_height="60dp" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:backgroundTint="#E74C3C" android:text="Cancel" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="18sp" app:cornerRadius="4dp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/btnEditCart" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- Customer Floating Action Button for Cart --> <com.google.android.material.floatingactionbutton.ExtendedFloatingActionButton android:id="@+id/fabCart" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_margin="16dp" android:text="Cart (0) - PHP 0.00" android:visibility="gone" app:icon="@drawable/ic_shopping_cart" app:backgroundTint="?attr/colorPrimary" app:iconTint="?attr/colorOnPrimary" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnPrimary" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/bottomNavigation" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" />
<com.google.android.material.bottomnavigation.BottomNavigationView android:id="@+id/bottomNavigation" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="?attr/colorSurface" android:visibility="gone" app:itemIconTint="?attr/colorPrimary" app:itemTextColor="?attr/colorOnSurface" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:menu="@menu/customer_bottom_nav" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
<com.google.android.material.navigation.NavigationView android:id="@+id/navigationView" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_gravity="start" android:background="?attr/colorSurface" app:headerLayout="@layout/nav_header" app:itemTextColor="?attr/colorOnSurface" app:itemIconTint="?attr/colorOnSurface" app:menu="@menu/drawer_menu" />
</androidx.drawerlayout.widget.DrawerLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.coordinatorlayout.widget.CoordinatorLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/background">
<com.google.android.material.appbar.AppBarLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content">
<com.google.android.material.appbar.MaterialToolbar android:id="@+id/toolbar" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="?attr/actionBarSize" app:title="Profile" app:navigationIcon="@drawable/ic_arrow_back" app:navigationIconTint="@color/neon_pink" app:titleTextColor="@color/neon_pink" />
</com.google.android.material.appbar.AppBarLayout>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp" android:gravity="center_horizontal" app:layout_behavior="@string/appbar_scrolling_view_behavior">
<androidx.appcompat.widget.AppCompatImageView android:id="@+id/imgProfile" android:layout_width="120dp" android:layout_height="120dp" android:layout_marginTop="32dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_person" app:tint="@color/neon_pink" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvProfileName" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:text="Guest User" android:textColor="@color/neon_pink" android:textSize="22sp" android:textStyle="bold"/>
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvProfileEmail" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="guest@example.com" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="16sp"/>
<Button android:id="@+id/btnEditProfile" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="32dp" android:text="Edit Profile" android:backgroundTint="@color/neon_pink" android:textColor="@color/on_primary"/>
</LinearLayout>
</androidx.coordinatorlayout.widget.CoordinatorLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.coordinatorlayout.widget.CoordinatorLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/background">
<com.google.android.material.appbar.AppBarLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content">
<com.google.android.material.appbar.MaterialToolbar android:id="@+id/toolbar" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="?attr/actionBarSize" app:title="Profile" app:navigationIcon="@drawable/ic_arrow_back" app:navigationIconTint="@color/neon_pink" app:titleTextColor="@color/neon_pink" />
</com.google.android.material.appbar.AppBarLayout>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp" android:gravity="center_horizontal" app:layout_behavior="@string/appbar_scrolling_view_behavior">
<androidx.appcompat.widget.AppCompatImageView android:id="@+id/imgProfile" android:layout_width="120dp" android:layout_height="120dp" android:layout_marginTop="32dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_person" app:tint="@color/neon_pink" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvProfileName" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:text="Guest User" android:textColor="@color/neon_pink" android:textSize="22sp" android:textStyle="bold"/>
<!-- Role badge: shown only when a role is resolved --> <com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:id="@+id/chipRole" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:text="Customer" android:textColor="@color/on_primary" android:visibility="gone" app:chipBackgroundColor="@color/neon_pink" app:chipStrokeWidth="0dp" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Chip.Assist" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvProfileEmail" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="guest@example.com" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="16sp"/>
<!-- Sign-in provider badge --> <com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:id="@+id/chipProvider" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:text="Email / Password" android:textColor="@color/on_primary" android:visibility="gone" app:chipBackgroundColor="@color/neon_pink" app:chipStrokeWidth="0dp" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Chip.Assist" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnEditProfile" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="32dp" android:text="Edit Profile" android:backgroundTint="@color/neon_pink" android:textColor="@color/on_primary"/>
<!-- Only shown for email/password accounts --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnChangePassword" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:text="@string/btn_change_password" android:visibility="gone" app:strokeColor="@color/neon_pink" app:cornerRadius="12dp" android:textColor="@color/neon_pink" />
</LinearLayout>
</androidx.coordinatorlayout.widget.CoordinatorLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<!-- Current Password --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/tilCurrentPassword" style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:hint="@string/hint_current_password" app:passwordToggleEnabled="true" app:startIconDrawable="@android:drawable/ic_lock_lock">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etCurrentPassword" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="textPassword" android:imeOptions="actionNext" /> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- New Password --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/tilNewPassword" style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:hint="@string/hint_new_password" app:passwordToggleEnabled="true" app:startIconDrawable="@android:drawable/ic_lock_lock">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etNewPassword" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="textPassword" android:imeOptions="actionNext" /> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Confirm New Password --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/tilConfirmNewPassword" style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:hint="@string/hint_confirm_password" app:passwordToggleEnabled="true" app:startIconDrawable="@android:drawable/ic_lock_lock">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etConfirmNewPassword" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="textPassword" android:imeOptions="actionDone" /> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
</LinearLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="24dp" android:background="?attr/colorSurface">
<!-- Handle hint --> <View android:layout_width="40dp" android:layout_height="4dp" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:layout_marginBottom="20dp" android:background="#CCCCCC" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/login_dialog_title" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceTitleLarge" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurface" android:textStyle="bold" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp" />
<!-- Email --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/tilEmail" style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:hint="@string/hint_email" app:startIconDrawable="@android:drawable/ic_dialog_email">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etEmail" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="textEmailAddress" android:imeOptions="actionNext" /> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Password --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/tilPassword" style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:hint="@string/hint_password" app:passwordToggleEnabled="true" app:startIconDrawable="@android:drawable/ic_lock_lock">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etPassword" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="textPassword" android:imeOptions="actionDone" /> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Sign In button --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnSignIn" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="20dp" android:text="@string/btn_sign_in" android:padding="14dp" app:cornerRadius="12dp" app:backgroundTint="?attr/colorPrimary" />
<!-- Divider --> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/divider_or" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurfaceVariant" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceLabelMedium" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:layout_marginBottom="4dp" />
<!-- Google Sign In --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnGoogleSignIn" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:text="@string/btn_sign_in_google" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurface" android:padding="14dp" app:strokeColor="?attr/colorOutline" app:cornerRadius="12dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_google" app:iconGravity="start" app:iconTint="@null" />
</LinearLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="24dp" android:background="?attr/colorSurface">
<!-- Handle hint --> <View android:layout_width="40dp" android:layout_height="4dp" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:layout_marginBottom="20dp" android:background="#CCCCCC" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/login_dialog_title" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceTitleLarge" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurface" android:textStyle="bold" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp" />
<!-- Email --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/tilEmail" style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:hint="@string/hint_email" app:startIconDrawable="@android:drawable/ic_dialog_email">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etEmail" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="textEmailAddress" android:imeOptions="actionNext" /> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Password --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/tilPassword" style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:hint="@string/hint_password" app:passwordToggleEnabled="true" app:startIconDrawable="@android:drawable/ic_lock_lock">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etPassword" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="textPassword" android:imeOptions="actionDone" /> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Sign In button --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnSignIn" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="20dp" android:text="@string/btn_sign_in" android:padding="14dp" app:cornerRadius="12dp" app:backgroundTint="?attr/colorPrimary" />
<!-- Forgot password --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnForgotPassword" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="end" android:layout_marginTop="2dp" android:text="@string/btn_forgot_password" android:textColor="?attr/colorPrimary" android:textSize="13sp" />
<!-- Divider --> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/divider_or" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurfaceVariant" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceLabelMedium" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:layout_marginBottom="4dp" />
<!-- Google Sign In --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnGoogleSignIn" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:text="@string/btn_sign_in_google" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurface" android:padding="14dp" app:strokeColor="?attr/colorOutline" app:cornerRadius="12dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_google" app:iconGravity="start" app:iconTint="@null" />
</LinearLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="24dp" android:background="?attr/colorSurface">
<!-- Handle hint --> <View android:layout_width="40dp" android:layout_height="4dp" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:layout_marginBottom="20dp" android:background="#CCCCCC" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/register_dialog_title" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceTitleLarge" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurface" android:textStyle="bold" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp" />
<!-- Full Name --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/tilName" style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:hint="@string/hint_full_name" app:startIconDrawable="@android:drawable/ic_menu_myplaces">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etName" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="textPersonName|textCapWords" android:imeOptions="actionNext" /> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Email --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/tilEmail" style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:hint="@string/hint_email" app:startIconDrawable="@android:drawable/ic_dialog_email">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etEmail" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="textEmailAddress" android:imeOptions="actionNext" /> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Password --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/tilPassword" style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:hint="@string/hint_password" app:passwordToggleEnabled="true" app:startIconDrawable="@android:drawable/ic_lock_lock">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etPassword" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="textPassword" android:imeOptions="actionNext" /> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Confirm Password --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/tilConfirmPassword" style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:hint="@string/hint_confirm_password" app:passwordToggleEnabled="true" app:startIconDrawable="@android:drawable/ic_lock_lock">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etConfirmPassword" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="textPassword" android:imeOptions="actionDone" /> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Create Account button --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnCreateAccount" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="20dp" android:text="@string/btn_create_account" android:padding="14dp" app:cornerRadius="12dp" app:backgroundTint="?attr/colorPrimary" />
<!-- Divider --> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/divider_or" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurfaceVariant" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceLabelMedium" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:layout_marginBottom="4dp" />
<!-- Google Register --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnGoogleRegister" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:text="@string/btn_register_google" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurface" android:padding="14dp" app:strokeColor="?attr/colorOutline" app:cornerRadius="12dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_google" app:iconGravity="start" app:iconTint="@null" />
</LinearLayout> </ScrollView>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="24dp" android:background="?attr/colorSurface">
<!-- Handle hint --> <View android:layout_width="40dp" android:layout_height="4dp" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:layout_marginBottom="20dp" android:background="#CCCCCC" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/register_dialog_title" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceTitleLarge" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurface" android:textStyle="bold" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp" />
<!-- First Name + Last Name row --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/tilFirstName" style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginEnd="6dp" android:hint="@string/hint_first_name" app:startIconDrawable="@drawable/ic_person">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etFirstName" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="textPersonName|textCapWords" android:imeOptions="actionNext" /> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/tilLastName" style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginStart="6dp" android:hint="@string/hint_last_name">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etLastName" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="textPersonName|textCapWords" android:imeOptions="actionNext" /> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Email --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/tilEmail" style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:hint="@string/hint_email" app:startIconDrawable="@android:drawable/ic_dialog_email">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etEmail" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="textEmailAddress" android:imeOptions="actionNext" /> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Password --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/tilPassword" style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:hint="@string/hint_password" app:passwordToggleEnabled="true" app:startIconDrawable="@android:drawable/ic_lock_lock">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etPassword" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="textPassword" android:imeOptions="actionNext" /> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Confirm Password --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/tilConfirmPassword" style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:hint="@string/hint_confirm_password" app:passwordToggleEnabled="true" app:startIconDrawable="@android:drawable/ic_lock_lock">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etConfirmPassword" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="textPassword" android:imeOptions="actionDone" /> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Create Account button --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnCreateAccount" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="20dp" android:text="@string/btn_create_account" android:padding="14dp" app:cornerRadius="12dp" app:backgroundTint="?attr/colorPrimary" />
<!-- Divider --> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/divider_or" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurfaceVariant" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceLabelMedium" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:layout_marginBottom="4dp" />
<!-- Google Register --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnGoogleRegister" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:text="@string/btn_register_google" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurface" android:padding="14dp" app:strokeColor="?attr/colorOutline" app:cornerRadius="12dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_google" app:iconGravity="start" app:iconTint="@null" />
</LinearLayout> </ScrollView>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="8dp">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/tilNewPassword" style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:hint="@string/hint_new_password" app:passwordToggleEnabled="true" app:startIconDrawable="@android:drawable/ic_lock_lock">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etNewPassword" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="textPassword" android:imeOptions="actionNext" /> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/tilConfirmPassword" style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:hint="@string/hint_confirm_password" app:passwordToggleEnabled="true" app:startIconDrawable="@android:drawable/ic_lock_lock">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etConfirmPassword" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="textPassword" android:imeOptions="actionDone" /> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
</LinearLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <menu xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"> <group android:checkableBehavior="single"> <item android:id="@+id/nav_pos" android:icon="@drawable/ic_pos" android:title="POS" /> <item android:id="@+id/nav_settings" android:icon="@drawable/ic_settings" android:title="Settings" /> <item android:id="@+id/nav_logs" android:icon="@drawable/ic_book" android:title="Logs" /> <item android:id="@+id/nav_inventory" android:icon="@drawable/ic_shelf" android:title="Inventory" /> <item android:id="@+id/nav_messages" android:icon="@android:drawable/ic_dialog_email" android:title="Customer Messages" /> </group>
<item android:title="Tools"> <menu> <item android:id="@+id/nav_print_orders" android:icon="@android:drawable/ic_menu_set_as" android:title="Print Orders" /> <item android:id="@+id/nav_download_csv" android:icon="@drawable/ic_csv" android:title="Download Report (CSV)" /> </menu> </item>
<item android:title="Account"> <menu> <item android:id="@+id/nav_logout" android:icon="@drawable/ic_logout" android:title="Logout" /> </menu> </item> </menu>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <menu xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"> <group android:checkableBehavior="single"> <item android:id="@+id/nav_pos" android:icon="@drawable/ic_pos" android:title="POS" /> <item android:id="@+id/nav_settings" android:icon="@drawable/ic_settings" android:title="Settings" /> <item android:id="@+id/nav_logs" android:icon="@drawable/ic_book" android:title="Logs" /> <item android:id="@+id/nav_inventory" android:icon="@drawable/ic_shelf" android:title="Inventory" /> <item android:id="@+id/nav_messages" android:icon="@drawable/ic_person" android:title="Customer Messages" /> </group>
<item android:title="Tools"> <menu> <item android:id="@+id/nav_print_orders" android:icon="@android:drawable/ic_menu_set_as" android:title="Print Orders" /> <item android:id="@+id/nav_download_csv" android:icon="@drawable/ic_csv" android:title="Download Report (CSV)" /> </menu> </item>
<item android:title="Account"> <menu> <item android:id="@+id/nav_profile" android:icon="@drawable/ic_person" android:title="My Profile" /> <item android:id="@+id/nav_logout" android:icon="@drawable/ic_logout" android:title="Logout" /> </menu> </item> </menu>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<resources> <string name="app_name">SanZin K-Store</string> <string name="cart_text">CART</string> <string name="add_product_content_description">Add Product</string> <string name="select_payment_method">Select Payment Method</string> <string name="pay_on_pickup">Pay on Pickup</string> <string name="pay_online_gcash">Pay Online (GCash)</string> <string name="order_placed_successfully">Order placed successfully!</string> <string name="failed_to_place_order">Failed to place order: %1$s</string> <string name="cart_empty">Your cart is empty!</string> <string name="proceeding_to_checkout">Proceeding to checkout for ₱%1$.2f</string> <string name="default_web_client_id" translatable="false">902665820500-mevo35t2jh2nc7g5u7p4ra96tcftrr1l.apps.googleusercontent.com</string>
<!-- Login screen --> <string name="login_title">SanZin K-Store</string> <string name="login_subtitle">Your local K-goods store</string> <string name="btn_guest">Continue as Guest</string> <string name="btn_login">Login</string> <string name="btn_register">Register</string> <string name="btn_about_us">About Us</string> <string name="btn_privacy_policy">Privacy Policy</string> <string name="divider_or">— OR —</string>
<!-- Login dialog --> <string name="login_dialog_title">Welcome Back</string> <string name="hint_email">Email Address</string> <string name="hint_password">Password</string> <string name="btn_sign_in">Sign In</string> <string name="btn_sign_in_google">Continue with Google</string>
<!-- Register dialog --> <string name="register_dialog_title">Create Account</string> <string name="hint_full_name">Full Name</string> <string name="hint_confirm_password">Confirm Password</string> <string name="btn_create_account">Create Account</string> <string name="btn_register_google">Register with Google</string>
<!-- Guest blocked message --> <string name="guest_purchase_blocked">You need an account to make purchases.
Please Login or Register.</string>
<!-- Seller access (legacy) --> <string name="login_continue_google">CONTINUE WITH GOOGLE</string> <string name="seller_access">Seller Portal</string> <string name="seller_email_hint">Seller Email</string> <string name="seller_password_hint">Password</string> <string name="seller_login_button">LOGIN AS SELLER</string> <string name="customer_login_button">CONTINUE AS CUSTOMER</string>
<!-- About Us --> <string name="about_us_title">About Us</string> <string name="about_us_content">Welcome to SanZin K-Store! 

We are a passionate local store dedicated to bringing you the finest Korean goods, meals, and beverages right to your neighborhood.

From authentic ramen and tteokbokki to refreshing milk teas and fruit sodas — everything is prepared with care and quality ingredients.

Founded in 2024, SanZin K-Store strives to make Korean culture accessible and enjoyable for everyone.

Thank you for supporting a local business! ❤️

Contact us:
sanzinkstore@gmail.com</string>
<!-- Privacy Policy --> <string name="privacy_policy_title">Privacy Policy</string> <string name="privacy_policy_content">Privacy Policy — SanZin K-Store
Last updated: April 2026

1. Information We Collect
We collect your name, email address, and order history when you create an account or place an order.

2. How We Use Your Information
• To process and fulfill your orders
• To send order confirmations and updates
• To improve our products and services
• To respond to customer support requests

3. Data Storage
Your data is stored securely using Google Firebase services. We do not sell or share your personal information with third parties.

4. Passwords
Passwords are hashed using SHA-256 before transmission and are never stored in plain text.

5. Your Rights
You may request deletion of your account and associated data at any time by contacting us at sanzinkstore@gmail.com.

6. Changes to This Policy
We may update this policy periodically. Continued use of the app constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

For questions, contact: sanzinkstore@gmail.com</string>
<!-- Inventory --> <string name="inventory_title">Store Inventory</string> <string name="update_inventory">UPDATE INVENTORY</string> <string name="no_image_preview">No Image Preview</string> <string name="change_photo">Change Photo</string> <string name="image_url_hint">Image URL (Optional)</string> <string name="available_inventory">Available in Stock</string> <string name="remove_product">REMOVE FROM STORE</string> <string name="product_name_hint">Product Name</string> <string name="description_hint">Description</string> <string name="price_hint">Price (₱)</string> <string name="category_hint">Category</string>
<string name="cancel_order">CANCEL ORDER</string> <string name="checkout">CHECK OUT</string> <string name="total_amount">TOTAL: ₱%1$.2f</string> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<resources> <string name="app_name">SanZin K-Store</string> <string name="cart_text">CART</string> <string name="add_product_content_description">Add Product</string> <string name="select_payment_method">Select Payment Method</string> <string name="pay_on_pickup">Pay on Pickup</string> <string name="pay_online_gcash">Pay Online (GCash)</string> <string name="order_placed_successfully">Order placed successfully!</string> <string name="failed_to_place_order">Failed to place order: %1$s</string> <string name="cart_empty">Your cart is empty!</string> <string name="proceeding_to_checkout">Proceeding to checkout for ₱%1$.2f</string> <string name="default_web_client_id" translatable="false">902665820500-mevo35t2jh2nc7g5u7p4ra96tcftrr1l.apps.googleusercontent.com</string>
<!-- Login screen --> <string name="login_title">SanZin K-Store</string> <string name="login_subtitle">Your local K-goods store</string> <string name="btn_guest">Continue as Guest</string> <string name="btn_login">Login</string> <string name="btn_register">Register</string> <string name="btn_about_us">About Us</string> <string name="btn_privacy_policy">Privacy Policy</string> <string name="divider_or">— OR —</string>
<!-- Login dialog --> <string name="login_dialog_title">Welcome Back</string> <string name="hint_email">Email Address</string> <string name="hint_password">Password</string> <string name="btn_sign_in">Sign In</string> <string name="btn_sign_in_google">Continue with Google</string>
<!-- Register dialog --> <string name="register_dialog_title">Create Account</string> <string name="hint_full_name">Full Name</string> <string name="hint_first_name">First Name</string> <string name="hint_last_name">Last Name</string> <string name="hint_confirm_password">Confirm Password</string> <string name="hint_current_password">Current Password</string> <string name="hint_new_password">New Password</string> <string name="btn_create_account">Create Account</string> <string name="btn_register_google">Register with Google</string> <string name="btn_forgot_password">Forgot Password?</string> <string name="btn_change_password">Change Password</string>
<!-- Guest blocked message --> <string name="guest_purchase_blocked">You need an account to make purchases.
Please Login or Register.</string>
<!-- Seller access (legacy) --> <string name="login_continue_google">CONTINUE WITH GOOGLE</string> <string name="seller_access">Seller Portal</string> <string name="seller_email_hint">Seller Email</string> <string name="seller_password_hint">Password</string> <string name="seller_login_button">LOGIN AS SELLER</string> <string name="customer_login_button">CONTINUE AS CUSTOMER</string>
<!-- About Us --> <string name="about_us_title">About Us</string> <string name="about_us_content">Welcome to SanZin K-Store! 

We are a passionate local store dedicated to bringing you the finest Korean goods, meals, and beverages right to your neighborhood.

From authentic ramen and tteokbokki to refreshing milk teas and fruit sodas — everything is prepared with care and quality ingredients.

Founded in 2024, SanZin K-Store strives to make Korean culture accessible and enjoyable for everyone.

Thank you for supporting a local business! ❤️

Contact us:
kstoresanzin@gmail.com</string>
<!-- Privacy Policy --> <string name="privacy_policy_title">Privacy Policy</string> <string name="privacy_policy_content">Privacy Policy — SanZin K-Store
Last updated: April 2026

1. Information We Collect
We collect your name, email address, and order history when you create an account or place an order.

2. How We Use Your Information
• To process and fulfill your orders
• To send order confirmations and updates
• To improve our products and services
• To respond to customer support requests

3. Data Storage
Your data is stored securely using Google Firebase services. We do not sell or share your personal information with third parties.

4. Your Rights
You may request deletion of your account and associated data at any time by contacting us at kstoresanzin@gmail.com.

5. Changes to This Policy
We may update this policy periodically. Continued use of the app constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

For questions, contact: kstoresanzin@gmail.com</string>

<string name="cancel_order">CANCEL ORDER</string> <string name="checkout">CHECK OUT</string> <string name="total_amount">TOTAL: ₱%1$.2f</string> </resources>
